text: Artificial intelligence, or AI, is the ability of computers and machines to perform tasks that usually require human intelligence. This includes learning, problem-solving, and decision-making. One important part of AI is machine learning, where computers learn from data without being explicitly programmed. Another advanced area is deep learning, which uses complex neural networks to analyze large amounts of information. You probably use AI every day without realizing it. For example, virtual assistants like Siri and Alexa, product recommendations on shopping websites, and even the filters on your camera all rely on AI to improve your experience.
